summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Configurable Dashboard (Pro Plan) and AI Assistant features. All 12 requested features tested and verified working correctly. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard config API correctly returns default widgets when no config exists
AI Assistant uses real OpenAI GPT-5.2 for chat (not mocked)
Image generation uses real Gemini Nano Banana via Emergent LLM Key (not mocked)
AI Assistant correctly queries business data (revenue: ₹71,880, bookings: 120, outlets: 30)
Dashboard edit mode shows drag handles and remove buttons for widgets
Add Widget modal displays all 11 widget types with proper categorization
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (ai-assistant-btn, ai-assistant-panel, assistant-input, send-message-btn, configurable-dashboard)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data (30 outlets, 120 bookings, ₹71,880 revenue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configurable Dashboard and AI Assistant features fully tested. All features working: Dashboard customization (edit mode, add/remove widgets, drag & drop), multiple dashboard views (Pro feature), AI chat with GPT-5.2, image generation with Gemini Nano Banana.

dashboard_default_widgets.details: Default widgets displayed: Total Outlets (30), Total Bookings (120), Total Revenue (₹71,880), Avg Rating (4.2), Recent Bookings, Top Outlets, Recent Transactions

dashboard_customize_button.details: Customize button shows edit mode with Done button and Add Widget button

dashboard_add_widget_modal.details: Modal opens showing 11 widget types: 4 Stat Cards + 7 Data Widgets

dashboard_multiple_views.details: Dashboard selector shows 'Your Dashboards' with 'Create New Dashboard' option (Pro feature)

ai_assistant_button.details: AI Assistant button visible at bottom of sidebar with Sparkles icon

ai_assistant_panel_opens.details: Panel opens with z-index 100, shows conversation sidebar and chat area

ai_assistant_chat_interface.details: Chat interface with message history, input field, send button, and quick action suggestions

ai_assistant_send_message.details: Message sent and AI response received with business data (Total revenue is ₹71,880)

ai_assistant_image_generation.details: Image generation button works, generates image using Gemini Nano Banana

api_assistant_chat.details: POST /api/assistant/chat sends message and gets AI response

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/reports - 200 OK (returns totalOutlets, totalBookings, totalRevenue, avgRating)
POST /api/assistant/chat - 200 OK (sends message, gets AI response)

mocked_apis.note: All AI integrations use real APIs via Emergent LLM Key - OpenAI GPT-5.2 for chat, Gemini Nano Banana for image generation
